titleStmt.title: Takuhon / Gi Tei Doshvo zenhi narabini Rikucho hi 2-shu (rubbing set, 42 sheets) (rubbing)
拓本／魏鄭道昭全碑並六朝碑２種（拓本）

msIdentifier.repository: ColBase — National Institutes for Cultural Heritage (National Museums of Japan)

msContents.summary: Ink rubbing of a Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 (Tei Dōshō) Daoist cliff inscription: Takuhon / Gi Tei Doshvo zenhi narabini Rikucho hi 2-shu (rubbing set, 42 sheets). Holding institution: Tokyo National Museum 東京国立博物館 (item TB-229). 42 sheets (42枚). Record-only: image_files array empty, images_zip_url null, no links, no thumbnail. Detail API /colbaseapi/v2/collection_items/tnm/TB-229 returns HTTP 200 with full metadata but zero images. Title indicates a comprehensive rubbing set of Zheng Daozhao's complete steles (全碑) bundled with two Six Dynasties steles.

support.objectType: 拓片 · ink rubbing on paper

origin.origDate: No date fields populated in the ColBase record (jidai_seiki null). Original inscriptions are Northern Wei (Zheng Daozhao, d. 516); rubbing date not stated in record.

bibl.ref: ColBase — National Institutes for Cultural Heritage (National Museums of Japan) — record

revisionDesc.change: Zheng Daozhao 鄭道昭 (Tei Dōshō) Daoist cliff inscription; harvested from ColBase — National Institutes for Cultural Heritage (National Museums of Japan) via the Epiwen Japanese-repository workflow. Provenance-only (no public IIIF image).

div.p: Ink rubbing — see the linked record/manifest.
